content:
had to make another one bcuz the first one is in mandarin (the truth is i actually used a translator for that forum since i suck at mandarin). anyways i'm making a forum for english-speaking fans of the game as a restart to the first forum

speaking of that, i drew horla with a new acrylic marker set that arrived at my house yesterday because she's a woman so pretty i started crying 🥹

(idk how to tag this, so consider this as a fanart and fan animation forum :'D)
thread_title: aomi's morimens fan content corner (english ver.) 🎨
